I just grabbed a sandwich, you know, oh, I'm back at the desk, you know I just what a waste of time But there's another population that also hates Twitter. They don't get it. Hey, okay content creation and the video factor So going back to this we understand this right nobody has questions about this I will I will not be mad if somebody does we're doing stuff on here to get them there right easy Okay, so I'm gonna talk a little bit about video being the catalyst in social list building video marketing particularly YouTube in itself Is social media a lot of people don't think of YouTube as a social networking site Do have you guys ever thought of it as anything more? Do you think it was just a place to upload videos? Be honest and some people just use it as a place to upload videos. It's actually a social networking site in itself A lot of people and a lot of marketers think a video is just a slick tool to get like better options Or maybe a better sales letter How many how many you notice that Russell primarily only does video sales letters a lot of marketers They only treat it that way and And to be honest and I've even seen main street marketers like you know Cabinet makers and insurance agents in real estate and starting to use it, but they're just using like as a commercial There's just so mainstream of thinking videos are the living breathing essence of who we are and what I love about is they cannot lie How many of you guys know that there's some bad people in internet marketing? They will be ousted on video You can tell you see them you see their face and this is what's so important if the prospect sees you on video And it's not about attractiveness. It's about your authenticity. It's about your confidence. I want to go into the Facebook secret sauce So really some really good tactics for you to walk away with today and go on your phone Go on your computer and start implementing today with Facebook to start generating some content. So news feed Some basics them I'm not going to pretend that everyone knows everything about Facebook in here So I don't want to skip a part so on the news feed when you go there It's your main page on Facebook and it's going to show you what all your friends are doing It's gonna show you everything that they're posting everything like that it defaults to top news So what that is is they're gonna show you your top friends posts of the day the most recent stuff Stuff that's getting a lot of comments on it and I'm gonna share with you how that works here in a second You can flip it to most recent if you want to see maybe who's online and posting right now I'll say like four seconds ago, you know Mitch posted this status update or whatever The key is to getting FaceTime with your following Because how many you know that your your fate your following is not just sitting on there waiting for you to post Right, they're not just sitting there, you know waiting refreshing your profile What is she gonna put something funny or inspiring or a great tip for me? so Just like any traffic source just because you post and upload content doesn't mean that people are gonna see it So you have to understand the metrics of Facebook software engineering. I've never had any I've never seen anybody share this at all It's edge rank How many guys have heard of edge rank before? Like three in the room four in the room Okay edge rank Has three components. This is the Facebook algorithm if you learn how to dominate this you will get the most impressions on your posts You go the most eyeballs on your posts You will start driving traffic to your website if you do not utilize this your efforts are void First off there is an affinity score between the viewing user and the items creator me basically between friends So the better of a relationship I have with a person like the reason why I see my mom's on my news feed all the time It's because we're constantly private messaging each other. I go to her wall a lot. She comes to my wall a lot I comment on her pictures. So when there's an affinity or relationship of FaceTime being built It strengthens the affinity score. So you're gonna show up on that person's news feed more and more often I'm not speaking it. You guys are all following me, right? See a couple of eyeballs some brain fog For instance, you'll have a higher affinity score with somebody that you talked to a lot as opposed to maybe an old acquaintance that you Haven't spoken to in years Second there's a weight given to each type of edge now. They won't post this of course Facebook's not gonna give away their metrics So I don't know exactly But here's what we think is that somebody comments on like one of your videos are satisfied It probably weighs more than if somebody just clicks on like So probably has more weight to it if you get a bunch of comments on something as opposed to 20 likes and Finally the most obvious factor is time the older an edge is the less important it becomes So if you notice when you go on your news feed things are usually in the last couple hours, right? It's rare that you see anything that's more like 24 hours old. I mean very rarely So time is is a very obvious factor So when you multiply these factors for each individual edge The more likely your content your post will show up on your friend's news feed The more of the story is if you want your content your brand your image being shared Before you post anything make sure it's something that your audience will actually see value in and want to participate in Don't just post Well have nothing to say today Because you're gonna hurt your edge rank so one of the things that I do some of the little things that I I do to increase my edge rank. I'll ask questions So like if you were a Crayola crayon color, what would you be? Stupid right I get 80 comments and 50 likes boom edge rank So now I'm much more likely to show up on their news feed again now edge rank fades with time So if you're not consistent, you're gonna lose it, but if you do it consistently like anything it's mastering the mundane You're gonna dominate it. I'll ask questions, you know, what's the what's the best city you've ever been to in the world? You know, where are you from? Hot dogs or hamburgers. Yes simple little things like that and it sounds so stupid. Why would a marketer say that? To just engage if I can get more eyeballs to my page Guess what they might see my website a video I posted an hour ago They might go start looking through reading my bio getting no more about me They go they might go click on my fan page and like it. They might go opt-in. They might see my blog go opt-in there So it's all about funneling people back to you So this is not a waste because otherwise status updating this waste if you're not driving traffic So here's just some things in action So just some videos that I posted You can see just people liking it people commenting on it And so these were dominating the news feed for like a day and it doesn't you don't need 15 comments But it's very rare if you don't have any comments or even just like a like You're probably not going to show up on more than if you have a like a thousand friends Maybe 20 are gonna see it As opposed to now what's awesome is that on your fan page how many guys know that there's a difference between a profile page and a fan page? Yeah, what's awesome about your fan page? One of the things that I do and this is just like a little extra little tip for you guys to really engage your following Is I asked for participation a lot of times I get to giveaways $5 Starbucks card $25 and X gift card leave a comment below share this to Facebook. I Just did one the other day. I did a share leave a comment on my blog and share it to your Facebook to chance to win my ebook What was that costing me? Nothing But thousands of visitors within like 48 hours. It's amazing one of the best things I do I asked for participation. I asked people leave a comment. I asked people to do something Don't let them off the hook a lot let them off Hook without doing nothing and again, you can kind of see what you have to do is just go into the Facebook search Type start typing the name of your video that you just posted and it'll tell you how many just shared it 35 people shared it They can go in and you can see everyone who it is and go comment go friend them so We'll wrap up with some Facebook things 50% of what you're sharing is a Status updates make sure it's inspiring relevant To upload videos if you're constantly just updating like your status, you know upload some pictures Show them what's going on. You just went to Cancun. You just got a trip from an affiliate contest Or it's your 25th wedding anniversary people want to see what your lifestyle is most of the time we're lifestyle marketers So share what you're doing if you have a mobile phone Just take a quick snap of some of the things that you're doing and to share with people you'd be amazed at response You can use events very well If you want to like do webinars might be kind of useful in this crowd If you have a party or something that you want to do I Heard a great quote once from Danny Johnson nothing becomes dynamic until it becomes specific So be very specified and focused to the individuals that you add on Facebook For instance, don't sell makeup to football players So if you're in the pet industry, where would you find your friends? dog groups Dog meetups cat meetups horse meetups people on Facebook that like you know animal related stuff You don't want somebody that hates dogs And you're selling, you know canine diapers or whatever it was Yeah, and again, you know if it's somebody if it's a football player you're selling Mary Kay They're probably not gonna watch your makeup review. So it's just not gonna be relevant to them. Also. Do you have a new profile picture? Little bit full of lots of little random things like that Do be consistent with your postings master the mundane most the traffic that is generated in your visibility is based on the consistency One of the things with YouTube is that for the first few weeks that you're publishing videos YouTube doesn't even index you like I don't know you Who you be I don't trust you you have no you have very little likes you have very little comments Nobody's subscribed to you And it's not that somebody's indexing you it's just a metrics and they're like this this is probably not relevant So it takes some time Don't go a week without doing a status update. You'll kill your edge rank Don't expect results overnight. It's like a snowball There's a bandwagon effect. I went from like 2017-18,000 fans in months Because the more that people liked me more people are like huh all these people like her I think it's kind of like just like we're getting people in line. I don't know where I'm going I'm just in line, you know, and it's just this bandwagon offense effect stay consistent and don't give up There's so much out there So much that you can do I hope you guys really enjoyed it god bless
